examples: The songs he recorded were written by a small coterie of dedicated writers.
There’s a coterie of news hounds calling themselves as citizen journalists behind Wikinews.
So they didn't want one king to arise, and they didn't want a small coterie of leaders to arise.
In defecting to HP, she arrived alone, without the usual coterie of trusted assistants.
Entirely new technologies are foundlings that come into the world unrecognised except by a fanatical coterie.
